segments.text: Yes, okay. Which language are you comfortable with, sir?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. I am Dr. Nidhi Pancholi speaking from Tata AIA Life Insurance. So, am I speaking with Mr. Chiragkumar Dayaljibhai Gambhava?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This is regarding your insurance policy. We have decided to proceed with your proposal. But as part of the process, we need to conduct a video medical verification where I will ask you some verification and medical history questions.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This call will be recorded for company audit and quality purposes. I will ask you a few questions related to your insurance application, and this recorded call will last approximately 10 to 12 minutes. I hope we can continue the call.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please note that your answers and information regarding your health and habits on this call will be considered part of your insurance application, and if the proposal is accepted, it will form the basis of a legal contract of insurance between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any false or incorrect statements or answers can affect the contract and may lead to cancellation of the policy before or after issuance, and then the claim may also be denied. Therefore, you are requested to answer thoughtfully and appropriately.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: What are you doing currently? Are you still studying or?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Please show your ID proof on camera.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Could you please state your PAN number once?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, good. From where are you speaking right now? City and State?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Now I will need a full view of you for capture, so you can stand up and pose like this for a selfie, and I will capture it.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hold it up like this so that your feet are also visible, in that way.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Raise your hand a bit more.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, okay. Good, done. Sit down now.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Now we will start the question and answer session. In the last two years, have you used tobacco, nicotine, or any smoking product?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Do you use cigarettes, e-cigarettes, or bidis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Yes, I eat gutkha. Two or three times a day.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: How much do you eat in a day?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Besides that, any other nicotine replacement product, like nicotine patches or anything like that? Then, cigars, pipes, or anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever received advice from a doctor to reduce or stop alcohol?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I don't drink alcohol, so no advice.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Besides that, have you used any other drugs or narcotics that were not prescribed by a doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, I don't use anything like that. I just eat gutkha.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Now, whatever medical conditions I mention, if you have ever had them, or had any reports done for them, or had any treatment in the past, or if any treatment is currently ongoing, you need to tell me, okay? First is high or low BP and increased cholesterol level.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Then chest pain, heaviness in the chest, discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, coronary artery disease, any heart valve problem, any childhood heart problem, palpitations, shortness of breath, any such heart condition?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then, cancer or precancerous condition, blood cancer, enlarged lymph nodes, skin lesions, or any abnormal lumps such as dysplasia, sarcoma, tumor, polyp, nodule, cyst, or lump?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then diabetes, meaning high blood sugar or sugar in urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism, or any endocrine problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then asthma, meaning shortness of breath, bronchitis, sinus problem, TB, pneumonia, frequent cough, sleep apnea, emphysema, COPD, or any respiratory problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then liver problems such as hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, or any type of liver problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then low blood count, meaning anemia, thalassemia, systemic lupus erythematosus, or any blood or autoimmune disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then brain problems such as anxiety, depression, seizures, paralysis, weakness of limbs, stroke, transient ischemic attack, or any neurological problems such as multiple sclerosis, Parkinson's, dementia, Alzheimer's, anything like that?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then stomach problems such as gastritis, GERD, stomach ulcers, frequent indigestion, irritable bowel syndrome, Barrett's esophagus, atrophic gastritis, Crohn's disease, ulcerative colitis, or pancreatitis, any such stomach diseases?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then kidney stones or gallstones, kidney or urinary infection, or blood or protein in urine, any long-term kidney problem, kidney failure, hemorrhoids, piles, or hydrocele, any such issues?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then frequent back pain, arthritis, gout, slipped disc, muscular dystrophy or deformity, physical disability, or any muscle, bone, joint, or spine problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no spine or back problems either.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. Then blindness, cataract or glaucoma, any vision problems, double vision, or any eye problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Then any problem with hearing, speaking, hoarseness of voice, difficulty swallowing, any discharge from the ear, or any ear, nose, throat problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no ear, nose, throat problems.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Besides this, is there anything else about your health and habits that is important and you want to mention for the policy?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, health is perfectly fit, so there are no diseases or anything like that.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. And in the last five years, have you had any medical condition that required you to undergo any imaging scan reports such as X-ray, ultrasound, MRI, PET scan, CT scan, biopsy, ECG, treadmill test, any endoscopy, or blood or urine test?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: No, no such reports have been done.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Any treatment that lasted more than two weeks, or required you to see a specialized doctor?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Has it happened that for more than two weeks you were unable to perform your daily activities and had to take leave from work? In the last five years?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any congenital or birth problems such as cerebral palsy, Down syndrome, or polio?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, have you and your partner been tested for any STDs such as HIV and AIDS?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Reports have been done, but there's nothing.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: And besides this, have you ever experienced anything like excessive weight loss or weight gain, or any other signs or symptoms that might require medical treatment or a surgical procedure?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Okay, so you hereby declare and agree that the details and answers to the questions provided are complete and true, and these answers will become part of the policy record. Thank you for the information and cooperation. Have a good day.
segments.speaker: doctor
